star_1.text: Not like the ad. The ad looks fun. You just slide forever trying not to hit stuff, almost like an endless runner. But this starts you off with a slingshot that only shoots you forward a few feet. And to go further, you have to do it over and over so you can buy upgrades. Played for an hour, dozens of upgrades, still not far enough for it to be fun. The game sucks. They need to change it to make it an endless surfing game. That would be fun.

the game was great! I even decided to throw down the $6 or so dollars to pay for an add free experience and just mindlessly zoom my penguin forward. then I beat level 1. now the game that I paid for requires me to watch ads in order to acquire tickets. because a ticket is required in order to launch the sled or even pay the game. so when they advertise 'purchase here to remove required ads' it is a lie by omission or technicality at best. dishonest at worst. the game becomes unplayable at lvl2.

I downloaded it and paid the $6 or $7 to eliminate ads. Of course it still tries to get you to pay for everything constantly but it was fine and pretty fun without the ads. Then I completed level 1. In level 2, it only allows you to play 1 time before having to wait 5 minutes or buy "tickets". 5 minutes every time for 1 run. Wow. Does this really work for some people?

I paid $6.99 to play without ads. When you progress to the second level you're awarded a certain amount of tickets you can use to pull the slingshot. Otherwise you wait 10 minutes per ticket or pay for them. It is such a fun game too. With how slowly things progress what's fun about it is doing it for long periods of time. Being forced to pay or wait ruins what is fun about the game. :(

I installed and really enjoyed the game, to the point I purchased the no ads with 10 diamonds. Only to discover after I had played so many rounds, I had to have "tickets" to keep playing. And guess how you get tickets... Watching ads of course. Requested a refund and uninstalling as soon as I've finished this review. It's a shame that fun games have to be ruined by all the ads. Not worth it.

rip off. is the game fun? yes it is. however if you don't pay for it there is ad every two runs. No big deal. want to pay the 10 like I did so you don't have to close and reopen the app to skip the adds? I did. however that's where I messed up. I figured if you buy a game so you don't have to watch adds one could guess you would also not have to wait for tickets to keep playing. Okay so you wait on your tickets. well guess what. if you don't watch the "triple it" ads your tickets run out quickr

Game is rigged and takes away your progress in order to force you to pay money. They have daily missions that cant realistically be completed without buying currency. They have a limited number of attempts ... unless you buy currency. Games interesting, shame its hardly a "game" and not just a fancy lie. What a terrible way game development has gone.

At first, the game was SUPER fun for me and I played it for hours straight. The ads are extremely annoying because they force you to click on them even when you click skip or the little x. Level 1 was super fun, but after so many runs of level 2, suddenly there's a ticket system and now the game is pay to play! Being able to try over and over however many times I want was one of the best parts, and now that's gone, so I'm deleting this game right after leaving this review.

It takes about a couple hours to finish the first level, if you don't have anything else to do that day. Only for you to have every upgrade you gained reset, as well as place a Ticket system that wasn't even introduced in the first level. A system which makes you only allowed to play so many times. This game literally restricts you from playing, for money. You have no option to choose which level you want to go to either, once you unlock another. I just wanted something fun during a day off.

The game started out fun. I paid to remove the required adds after about 30 minutes. I was entertained but their frequency was a bit much. I would give this app 4 stars but then I hit level 2. The game changes its mechanics and gets ridiculous. No more endless fun sledding, now you have tickets used on every pull. I regret wasting my money on this game. Find another way to spend your time and money.

Progress on your sled, slingshort and gold gains resets every level. Takes about a 2-4 hours of consistent play to get most of your stuff upgraded enough to beat a level. There's points where every other 'run' has ads. Sometimes there's an offer to multiple your gains by x3 by watching an ad. However, its a gamble as to whether the ad just locks you out of the game completely. Saw it as an ad on Instagram, gameplay isn't too different from the spam but the progression is an outright lie.

the amount of ads and ticket system kills the game. it is enjoyable. more over the constant ads forcing you to stop and take 2 or more minutes for an ad to play 2 or so minutes worth of the game is top tier on the list of most annoying things ever. once you get past level 1 (which took about an hour and a half of ads and gameplay together) you're moved on to level 2! cool right?! wrong. you now have no upgrades. no ability to go back to level 1 and use those upgrades. you start all over! Yay!

it's a moderately entertaining casual game. at first it had the average amount of micro transactions and ads we have all come to expect from these types of games. But after the first level they introduce"Cart Tickets" which are a currency that determines how many times you can play the game.... They do refill one every 20 minutes. But a play last anywhere between 10 and 20 seconds. I paid the $7 to get rid of the ads I should be able to just play the game I regret giving them those $7.

deceitful pay-to-play scheme. When I first downloaded the game, I played hundreds of rounds in a row. I even paid $7 to remove forced ads (which last forever, force an interaction from the user to close, and will drive you insane). Still, happy to pay to remove them s I was enjoying the game. Today, after perhaps 20 rounds, the game suddenly stops allowing me to launch my character, saying I need to pay $3 for "tickets" to continue playing. Unreal.

what is this ticket system BS. I downloaded because of an ad and loved the idea of the game, so much so, that I bought the ad free version fairly quickly which I hardly ever do. I felt the game was worth it. upon beating level 1 (which does take some time mind you) I was introduced to a ticket system that limits playtime in a game that is essentially launch, crash, repeat. not to mention on try is a 15 minute recovery. so tempted to refund/dispute my purchase. not the same game I spent money on!

SO MANY forced ads. One every 2 runs, where the ad is longer than the run. as well as the typical ads for bonuses, except sometimes when you do ads for bonuses you don't get the bonus. horrible progression without the bonuses unless you spend money and bonus ads only work about half the time. you will spend more time watching ads than playing the game.

Game doesn't have that many forced ads, but if you want to progress a level before your two year old child graduates from high school, you'll watch optional ads. You can of course pay the 9.99 to remove FORCED ads, but you'll still find yourself watching the optional ads to triple your money or acquire gems, which is necessary for booster. The optional ads are sometimes over a minute long. You'll spend more time watching ads than playing. Your sled and sling go back to level 1 after each level.

this game could be allot of fun. They decided to force you to watch long advertisements after every time you use the sled. impossible to get into the game constantly having to switch screens to watch content nobody cares about. game progression takes for ever. be prepared to make well over 100 sled runs to gain enough upgrades to even finish stage 1. a goal I have not accomplished. im sure I've spent more time navigating forced adds than actual game play. its a discrace.

Ruined their own game, which could be so simple and fun, by giving you only a limited amount of times you can slingshot, which is literally the entire point of the game. Unless you pay money to continue playing, or watch more ads to continue. Was fun until then, greed ruins things yet again. Ads for upgrades alone should be enough to make money off this game.

Great game at 1st. But then when you get the next sled, it resets all your progress and you have to start feom scratch again. Sucks, but fine. But then you realize you can't select the old sled, and then they restrict your play time behind "tickets" after paying almost 10 bucks to get rid of ads, etc. Now Im restricted to only playing when THEY choose or if I want to watch yet another ad. So, now you get uninstalled and rated low.You almost had me. Too bad you made some bad decisions.

star_2.text: The concept, graphics and game play are great. It is, however, far too hard to win. I'm not going to pay money for upgrades, so it takes 50 to 60(now over 100 on the 5th level)tries to build up enough resources to finish each level. No game is worth this much hassle. It's too bad. It would be a perfect 5 if they didn't make the difficulty so extremely high to advance. DO NOT PLAY THIS GAME IF YOU CAN'T HANDLE REPEATING THE SAME FRUSTRATING THING DOZENS OF TIMES FOR HOURS. *I give up.

Is much more boring than the ads. Its a very basic vehicle upgrade game like many others where you have to upgrade your slingshot and sled to try to get as far as you can. Its very slow. The ads just show extremely high levels of fast fun obstacles. Which you'll never get to if you dont put many hours & days into the game. Wish it was more like the ads for the whole game.

First level fun, second level started the tickets to play system. Uninstalled after that. Seems unreasonable to have to watch ads, and have to either buy tickets or wait to play. If they got rid of the tickets, I would reinstall because it is fun. I also don't knowhow to go back to level one from two, I wanted to do it really fast lol.

Very fun. The ads for this game shown on other games, shows a frog, or a turtle on the sled. Where are they? The penguin is cute, but I would like the turtle! I have over 22k in gems. Doesn't matter bc the courses are getting repetitive and I'm only on level 21! So I'll be saying 👋 to this game. Being able to replay a level with all your upgrades would save this game for me. 🤷

This game has so much potential, but is ultimately a waste of time. You have to try hundreds of times to grind enough money to beat a level, which then feels like a punishment when you start over with NOTHING carried into the next level. The physics, while consistent, are bland. Tricks do nothing for you and actually slow you down. Is there a game out there like this but better? The ad gameplay that convinced me to download it must be hundreds of hours further in than I care to go. Uninstalled.

This game, while cute and fun, is a cash cow. I paid 10.99 euro to get no forced ads and 10 gems. Still getting forced ads that take 2-3 mins to get out of. Can't upgrade rockets without gems, only way to get more gems of a significant level is to buy them. You can get about 12 gems through daily challenges, which most can't be done without gems. Level 2 brings another money scheme in the form of lives, only get 20 of them, then wait 20 mins for 1 more. wish I hadn't bothered spending the money.

Fun to kill time. I would say that the fact that you need tickets to launch your character made me rate it this low. That feature alone doesn't allow to grind as much as you would need to. additionally the only way to get tickets is with real money. You either wait to earn more tickets(tickets run out quick) or pay. Also exesive adds contributed to the rating (1 add every 2 launches for sure, i didn't count how many launches until you have to watch adds long add).

Cute repetitive game just changing the scenery with very little challenge. I would give 5 stars but the long annoying ads are way over kill trying to make you buy cheap gimmick junk at high prices. $200 for a frying pan?!?! Your out of your gord! Tiny gadgets to collect dust (clean air), yeah right! Not my home. You can pay to get rid of ads... All about the dollar. Ain't happening.

it's a good game overall but unfortunately rewards are only given half of the time when watching ads. I like the game but have wanted so much time on ads that don't give the promised reward that I'm about to uninstall. at this time I have been cheated out of over 1 million coins and 30 diamonds. pay can be glitchy sometimes so make sure you have a good stable and fast connection. fix the reward system and I'd give 2 more stars.

Another game that doesn't match the ad. It shows sledding in the snow with different vehicles going VERY fast, and it even shows crashes; however, when I downloaded the game, I barely got anywhere before the sled came to a complete stop with no noticeable way to speed it up. The game gives you coins based on how far you went, but you have to level up your sled and slingshot. It's impossible to pass level one the first time. Uninstalling game.

Level one was a lot of fun. No forced ads but I watched plenty to get more coins. After level 1 it's not fun anymore. The ticketing system is introduced that limits you to a couple turns before you have to wait for more tickets (or watch ads). Also more random ads starting at level 2. On top of that you start from scratch. No level 1 progress carries over to level 2. It feels like they want you to abandon the game after level 1. Mission accomplished!

I thought what a cool game. Decent graphics and you get to easily upgrade the sled and the slingshot. However, when I play a game, I like to play for hours and every single slingshot is an ad? I understand that someone's got to get paid but the amount of ads for a 5 sec slingshot then another ad, slingshot, there's another frickin ad. I have ADHD, and I don't like that. That's why I'm giving it 2 stars.

Ruined by greed. Is your idea of fun watching ads to gain "coins" to slowly make a game playable? If it is, this game is for you. I spent the occasional session to get through the first level, getting coins to improve the slingshot and sled quality and how many coins you can earn. Tedious, but once I cleared it, I had a slight smile... then you go to the next level and it resets to beginner sled and sling... and no... not doing that again. Just give us a playable game!

It's a very cute game, good graphics, simple to play and fun. However, everytime you reach a new level, you start from zero. All the gear you acquired and coins are lost. This makes the whole experience take forever to actually get anywhere and of course, keeps you exposed to more ads. By the third round, I decided to uninstall it. Not worth the over exposure to ads (and there are many). One of the ads was for a game with an asian girl removing her clothes btw. Watch your kids.

Installers beware, after you complete the first run, they hit you with "ticketing" that refreshes 1 ticket every 10 to 15 minutes to run the course. I have no idea why any developer would want to limit how many times someone can play their game. Read other reviews, too. Would much rather have the option to pay to upgrade versus pay to play & progress through the courses faster. Game's actually very fun but immediately uninstalled once I saw this addition for course 2 & beyond. 👎🏼👎🏼👎🏼

Just okay. Lots of ads, but the main problem is that it gets repetitive very fast. I enjoyed it at first, and the ads were tolerable. Unfortunately, there are only a handful of unique courses that quickly become rinse and repeat. Also a few stabiliy issues like the app crashing when trying to get triple rewards for watching an ad. Uninstalled.

the first level you can play as many times as you want, but when you beat it, then you are forced to go to the second level and can not return to the first. this would be ok if it didn't mean that you now need "tickets" to play, which you can only get thru watching ads or purchasing them. you get maybe 1 turn every hour for "free". there is no way to get back to the first level. I am deleting this bc I enjoyed it, but now I have to pay to play basically and it's not worth waiting for turns.

The game is pretty fun, but its overshadowed by all of the standard mobile pay-to-play tricks. There's an energy/ticket system, optional ads, frequent forced ads, purchasable gems, and nothing is cheap. The upgrades are tuned very low to get you to pay with gems or watch ads. The energy system is the worst — they know how unpopular and predatory these are, so it's hidden until you reach the second level. I'm feeling like the devs don't actually want me to play, so I won't.

It was 4-4 1/2 stars, I was really enjoying it and put some time in but after it deciding to stay stuck on the loading screen one day, I uninstalled and reinstalled and it fixed the problem. Unfortunately it wiped away all my progress and I had to start over. I played through the first level and I just don't have the desire anymore because I'm afraid all my progress will be deleted again.

Similar to their plane game in every way. You must watch ads to have any meaningful progression. if you refuse, there are forced ads. Generic *stat upgrade* simulator. And generic *every level is the same, just with bigger numbers to reach*. Also, haven't gotten that far yet, but usually when you see a "K" or "M" at the end of a number of a stat, the game is just a calculator. a literal calculator. Ad revenue generator.

star_3.text: Okay, when I say this game is pretty fun, I MEAN IT. I think collecting different characters is a fun thing to do. And the gameplay? Oh my god, I love it. But I wish that there weren't so many ads every few seconds. I don't mind getting more coins from ads, but almost every time the game resets? It's annoying. And I'm not paying for "no ads". But anyway, it's fun. Keep it up. OH AND MAYBE HIRE AN ARTIST OR SOMETHING THAN USING AI OR DRAW IT YOURSELF?

This is a fun game but way too many ads. You get a bonus if you watch them, but the ads are LONG and half the time you watch them and don't get the triple reward. If it weren't for the incessant. amounts of ads, I would have rated the game higher. The premise is fun, but the delivery and glitches, not so much. i also realized this game downloaded 6 other games that were being displayed and at no time did I click to download. this is so not cool.

Although I like the game's premise and design and find its physics entertaining, the developers only created 12 levels for it, so once you've played those 12 courses, the game just repeats itself endlessly, with only the daily tasks providing any variety at all. Also, the amount and length of ads that the game subjects you to are excruciating. 2/26 EDIT: CrazyLabs' response below implies the game has since been updated. It hasn't been. They urge me to keep playing; I don't think I will.

game is great, during the first level. if it was kept like that, I would rate it five stars. after the first level, the ticket system is insultingly meager. I downloaded this to kill time and even paid for ad free, just to either have to watch ads for new tickets twice every two to four hours or so, or buy more tickets, just to play the game. ridiculous,if you ask me. trying to get a refund, now.

I was really enjoying the first level of this game, thought it was a nice change of pace from all the other phone game requirements, such as a million ads and needing to make purchases just to advance. Then I got to the 2nd level...once here you're only allowed 3 turns before you have to wait 15 minutes to be allowed additional free game play. 1 turn every 15 minutes! This alone makes me want to delete the app. They shouldn't make you lose a ticket if you reach the goal. Kind of ridiculous.

this game has sooo much potential, but after 1 day, its terrible. you startoff slow. watching ads is optional for more coins & sled upgrades, which is cool.. but after 20+ upgrades, when you are finally moving fast, you beat the board and start over with a slowass sled. Idk why they decided to make the game like this... additionally, you can only slingshot a certain amount of times a day.. again, idk why its designed like this.. during times when I can't play, I just find other games to play

this game is misleading. You can play the first level over and over and level up, use all your diamonds. Then you finish the level and lose everything. Then you are gated to how many times you can play. I had paid to remove ads and now I wish I hadn't as now I'm not really enjoying the game past the first level.

I really loved this app but the tracks became repetitive very quickly! Please develop the app and make more levels and worlds! I also found all the triple ads to be a bit too much. Just let us pay to remove all ads and automatically triple our coins without having to watch. I would pay for this game without ads and with many more levels. It does crash sometimes too with the ads. Work more on this game please!

Cute little time killer, but gets kinda repetitive. I liked the skins for riders, maybe consider personalizing the sled. Made it 65% thru Level 2 before I ran out of tickets, and the 20 minute refresh for one more ticket is way too long. I watched all your ads and exhausted all the free options. A 5 minute countdown or more ads=tickets might entice me to keep the game and wait/come back, but 20 minutes per ticket just earned an uninstall.

Quite entertaining for the 1st round, although you have to have enough coins to buy adaptations for the sled, so I had to constantly watch an ad after every run! Come the 2nd round things changed for the worse! You suddenly have to start paying real money for tickets to be able to sled! You also have to pay for some adaptations to the sled with diamonds instead of coins, which are much more difficult to get. It's the ads that will make me give up. Don't want to keep changing avatars either!

Moderately entertaining for a while, a provate DNS helps getting rid of the forced ads, which is a great improvement. The gameplay is repetitive and there are bugs in the calculation of the daily goals (never to the player's advantage, weirdly enough ;) ). If I didn't have a way to skip the forced ads it would be 2 stars.

While I love the simplicity of the gameplay. I still have a vast amount of bugs. Level 1 was mostly glitch that I had to memorise my way through, level 2 had a vast amount of non-renered walls, pillars and ground. I also got knocked off for now reason. I am now on level 3 and the lag is insane due to non-renered items. Please see what you can do to fix this. Also, I have an idea. A player could use diamonds to purchase video skip tickets for the "triple it" function.

Fun til its not. The first level of this is one the most fun games I have played in a long time. However, the 2nd level starts out fine, but as the level progresses, it would seem that the game mechanics are altered so you start to veer into the rocks or the sled slides out from you, for no reason. Then, in order to progress, you have to either wait for 15 minutes for 3 tickets, or purchase them. You can watch ads for free, but the time takes away from the fun Cashgrab.

Could be fun, but you can't make it more than 10 feet to start with. then you have to upgrade your sled and slingshot and watch a thousand ads between each run and watch more ads to get gems for rocket boost. and after several days of that, you can make it though the level. then BAM, THEY REMOVE ALL YOUR UPGRADES at the start of the new level and you have to repeat the process over again. I suffered through ads for 90 upgrades and finally was able to have 1 fun run through the level.

I have had a lot of fun the past few days playing this game but the fun ended today after I just beat the 1st level, and I have no way to play it again. Lost all my sled upgrades and completely start from scratch in Level 2. Even the rocket boost I paid gems for the 1st level is gone. It's cool there's a lot of skins, but they're all ugly human characters except for the penguin. I've read other reviews saying they love the frog? I don't know why remove it. Should be all cute animal skins.

I absolutely love the game itself, however, in order to gain enough coins to advance at a reasonable rate, you have to watch a horrendously long (sometimes 1+ minute) commercial after every single run. If you pay for the no ads feature, it removes the "forced" ads, but you will still feel you have to watch the "optional" ones to advance. I deleted the game because of the ad situation. But I do miss the game! Honestly, if the ads were shorter (15ish seconds) I'd have kept the game.

Way too many adds, fun game but they start restricting the number of times you can go down the hill and you have to buy tickets. I'd still be enjoying it if it weren't for that. They also take every upgrade you earned from level 1 away from you and you have to start from scratch again. After Update: 3 stars, downloaded again after update, they still start you all over after level 1, all time and upgrades from level 1 are gone for level 2. It's fun, but not after level 1.

Cute game, very fun! When I was playing the first level, I liked it so much that I paid to remove forced ads. However, when I got to the second level, I saw there were "tickets" you had to use each time you sent your penguin down the hill. I would not have paid to remove ads if I knew this game had a time gate in the form of tickets. I don't mind paying for a game, but I was put off by the tickets.

Unless you pay to win, it will take a lot of dedicated time, and probably more than one day, to complete a single level. Then you think, "great! now I'll get through levels faster." wrong. you start completely over every level; even your gold resets. It's extremely repetitive and you don't get any kind of lasting feeling of accomplishment or progress. It was cute for a few days, but that's all.

I like this game. it very entertaining and challenging. my issue is that there are to many ads and they are to long. You can't complete the challenges without the ads. When I completed my first challenge and started the next challenge. All of my upgrades were gone but my gems used weren't restored. I would have to endure the ads again. I uninstalled it because of the ads.

star_4.text: Game is as advertised! 👍 The game is fun. I've only been playing the game for a few days but haven't really had any complaints. Simple fun game to play if you gotta kill 10 or 20 mins. There are ADs but they aren't bad at all. Quick 15 sec ones with an occasional 30 sec one. They do not show up after every try/play on a level. My experience has been 5-6 plays then a 15 sec AD. Then repeat that about 3 or 4 more times and that's when I'll be hit with a 30 sec AD. Hope that makes sense.

Fun game, ads every 2 runs is annoying but you can close the app and reopen to skip so it isn't too bad. The real issue is the mid-late round economy. Once you upgrade to slingshot/sled levels 16 or so it starts taking multiple runs to afford a single upgrade. However the 15 minute chest is 2-3x the gold as a single run, watch a 30 second ad to triple it and it's the same as 9 runs. Also maps should be longer. It's more fun going faster, but by the time you hit 115mph you beat the level.

Its fun. You gain an insanely small amount of speed on downhill, which feels disproportionate to the huge amount of speed you lose on uphill. But still, the ads arent horrible and getting "triple" your money for each ad is satisfying, even if it's still designed to require watching an ad every run to make meaningful progress later.

fun game, limited progress. I made it to level 17, and noticed the levels have been repeating. So I decided to level up the sled and slingshot as much as possible. Got them to over level 120, but now I can no longer open the chests that reset every 14 minutes. I was getting over 1B every time, so I think the game wasn't prepared for that. Too bad, I was able to slingshot my character over halfway down the track.

fun game.. pros... watch videos and you get something. Great for passing time. cons.. when presented to watch a video to get something and you decide not to, it'll force it on you anyhow from time to time. seems when you upgrade the rubber band or the sled, you should be able to progress further, but For some reason a single upgrade is weaker and you go less distance which I thought was kind of stupid and frustrating.

The game became repetitive as long the way. I kept seeing the same challenges. Also I get rewarded sleds that I never get to see so it appears game may still be in development to a certain extent. It's challenging enough to keep you coming back. Way to many forced ads, even if they are abbreviated. When your going for a triple reward, it will be at least 30 seconds if not more to have to wait and watch the repeated ads or game offers.

Fun, but the controls are a bit funky at times. It suddenly veers left or right for no apparent reason. I also wish the animation for the coins it gives you at the end of each run wouldn't get longer and longer with the amount of money. It's a bit annoying. Overall it's really good tho, it has ads but not an annoying amount

really entertaining, minimal ads, but there are only four or five levels and after that you start from the self first level and up to the same fourth and fifth. some levels have a lot of little shortcuts so it's cool to be able to explore them fully but it becomes boring at some point.

Well I liked playing this game to kill time & had gotten pretty far and unlocked several characters but then I had to replace my phone but sadly this game didn't save my progress so I'm back to the beginning. I'm still debating if it's worth trying to earn it all again. ALSO the frog that was the main starter character on the old version was much much more adorable. MINUS 1 STAR FOR REPLACING THE FROGGY!! 😞

I absolutely love this game, I can play it for hours. I have it on my phone & on my tablet. I love exploring the different courses, taking different paths to try and collect amm the coins. my only problem is.....Please come up with some NEW COURSES! The same courses repeating over & over is boring, give us something new!

It's a really fun game but the levels just repeat after a while. If I remember correctly they start to repeat after level 13/14. it needs some new levels and further upgrades. As for the end of level "reward" it should be a new sled design, instead of a pallet swap. allowing players to chose their favorite sleds would be great

Genuinely really enjoy this game, buggy physics and janky 3D models alike. Very charming and fun! My only criticism is the there aren't many levels and it's not fun looping through levels you've already played, especially if you can't choose which previous level you would like to revisit. I've paid to remove ads, and I would gladly pay for an expanded version of this game with new levels and characters. If you could customize your character, or have daily challenges, I would gladly pay again.

This game is really fun, but my 1 complaint is that you have to grind a TON to finish a level. I've been playing for a day, yet i STILL havent finished the first level. Also, can you please make the booster usable more than 1 time per level? If so, you could add a 3-5 second cooldown between boosts.

Like my previous review, I still think a major change is needed. Many players have complained about having to fully reset progress after each world. That’s the main reason I won’t spend real money-any gems I buy would just be used on rockets for the current world and then reset next game. There should be a prestige system after each world to make future progress easier. If your team can come up with some way to make it less frustrating to restart from zero every time we win, that would be nice.

Really enjoy the game, but there are bugs playing this on my Galaxy Ultra 24. On level two, rewards and are not rewarded for watching videos. Also, points are not tripled for watching video. Other than that, appreciate the frequency of ads. Great game. Keep up the good work Devs.

Fun game, but could be better with an explosion visual and loud KABOOM sound when you run into something. Addendum to initial post - I play this on IOS and Android. IOS, there's no problem, but, as I've just discovered, on the Android device, the "triple it" doesn't triple, and the X to exit the "triple it advert doesn't work. Both IOS and Android systems are up to date.

very fun game, not much else to say. which keeping it from getting five stars is the fact you don't gain speed downhill. what I mean by that is that when you just start, going down at all. rarely ever gives you speed unless you're going 90° downward. it's very nitpicky, But that was the first thing I noticed when I played.

Fun addictive game. Daily tasks were a nice addition. However theres only a few levels and they repeat with no changes. Sometimes you hit invisible stuff in the ground too but thats rare. Also, make the ability to do tricks more obvious. I thought it was automatic for like 2 weeks.

Fun, at first. Im on level 32. Thirty. Two. the levels just start repeating, I think, at level 10? Very much need new levels, and without a doubt hidden areas of boards that you need to get a ton of air/speed to discover. idk. its fun but gets boring once the levels repeat very early on.

l don't like it. I LOVE IT! It's fun, it's warm, it's silly. I'm a penguin and I'm always happy even if I crash. I find this a pointless waste of time, but I don't resent that. It's relaxing, and the string music underneath is wonderful. This suits much more than loud Rock which I can hear any time. If you're on FB avoid this. If, on the other hand you'd sooner be a penguin (not a sheep), then climb aboard your turbo ice ring and join me beneath the stars. Thoroughly recommended. Hop on!

star_5.text: This is a game of fun and challenging, very few quick ads & ads to increase your prize money,it actually had me laughing and smiling while playing for once instead of frustrated. As said there is some strategy needed,I use the Penquin and I feel kids could play too,give it a try, the lack of ads is a plus,only spend money if you want,what are you waiting for,give it at least a chance. :)

The penguin definitely sells this! Way too cute! But there are other characters to choose from. You have to level up but that's fairly easy to do with the coins you accumulate as you play. The challenge is seeing how far you can slide each time and that depends on your boosters you buy with the coins you've accumulated. I just started playing so I haven't had to purchase any extra boosters yet. The ads aren't terribly long, a few seconds here and there, but so far I'm loving it.

enjoyable mindless game. Ads are not forced upon you, but expect that you will be watching many short ads to earn coins faster. The only negative is the wasted time when you are collecting coins and gems; please create a setting to turn that off. I would rather watch an ad. Consider having an option that outlines the most efficient run. I just got to level 2. Is there a way to play previous levels?

Im on level 41 now and Im still not tired of this game. I think I may be addicted. But, I really wish there were more track layouts. The sled really starts going faster once you get the speed nose on it at about sled level 15 and when both the sling shot and sled levels are up to 35+, you will have close to enough speed to make it to the finish, of whatever level that your on. Cool game

the game is a fun way to pass the time when you got nothing going on or a good friendly competition between you and your wife lol. Even having to wait for tickets to play isn't so bad but I would recommend when a player clears a level and starts a new one, to give them something, either allow them to keep their rockets or add like .5 to the income or something. To have to start all over for the new level is a bit deflating. but overall its a good game.

I'm addicted to this game! It's very cute. (when you're the penguin) I like how you actually watch the ad to increase your winnings. It isnt throwing an ad up just because. One thing though, is I wish you could replay levels with the upgrades you got on that level. And maybe even max out the upgrades just because?

I LOVE this game but I'm so bummed out to be repeating levels. Level 1 through 13 are unique, fun to build up the upgrades and zoom through. I watched ads to get the booster maxed out every time and would often 3x the coins towards the end of levels. Now the motivation to play is lessened due to basically restarting the game without my knowledge with no prestige system or anything other than skin progress (which is whatever anyway, the penguin is the best player model). PLEASE ADD MORE LEVELS!

This game is incredibly fun to play, highly addictive, and beautifully designed. It consumed a lot of my time, until it started repeating the same exact levels I had already completed, and I lost interest. Please let me know when there's something new to see. Edit: Thanks dev for your response, the new update and levels are great, the game is better than ever. Please keep them coming.

I love this game. I just wish two things you were able to race a couple of people on this app. And to also keep the money and the winnings when you're done with getting to the end, you lose all your money.You've accumulated to start fresh and I wish that you can keep it and play with other players and race them besides that.This game is awesome💗🩵🤌🏽💋

Best game in History but could i please get the option to go back to level one? I miss that level and I am so unfamiliar with Level 2. I wanna go back. Going to Level 2 made me cry because it changes places and I always Loved Level 1, the map, the boosts, everything about it. Please add an option to make us be able to go back to Levels with our old progress in those levels. Thank you.

I love this game It's cute and fun and relatively simple to play and totally puts a smile on your face, especially with some of the more epic wipeouts. Good graphics, few ads but options to gain extra "cash" by watching more, and ads are relatively short. App won't open today though - is there a 2026 bug??

2nd review from 1 to 5 star first level is fun because its unlimited moves or play the downside of this game makes to loose all your upgraded slimgs and shed and income and have to start each level over. but its terribly addictive. second level onward you have 20 min before another play and you can watch a short ad to get another move or you can do something else and wait.

This is a cute and fun game that puts a smile on your face! I really like that there's not a whole bunch of advertisements that ruin the gameplay. You can choose more ad play if your objective is to to maximize your score -- or -- you can go with a more relaxed game play that isn't fragmented by countless ads! The graphics are cute and fun... did I already say that?!? This is one game I won't be uninstalling anytime soon!

What a cute game! You can opt to watch ads for more stuff, but you don't have to. I find myself leaning into turns to help the little penguin succeed. You can choose other sledders but the penguin is really the best. And when he crashes, he just gets up and waves, "I'm fine!"

I deleted my previous review because, as I had previously said that this is actually a good game, I decided to pay to remove ads. I can comfortably say that this has now made the game superb! Very playable, good graphics ( ok-ish sounds though ). Highly recommended.

Very addicting and very fun! I saw this game in an ad and decided to give it a try. I was surprised with how much I enjoyed the game. It's fun to slowly upgrade and progess your character and sled. There are a few ads here and there but there's nothing egregious. Definitely try it out!

You guys have made a very fun, cute game here. if I had any input to give, I'd love if some of the sledders you can get with the purple gems were things other than odd humanoids. like maybe some more cute animals like the penguin. but I did see the recent update with the daily tasks and I love that. good move and I look forward to seeing what else gets added. I was already playing a similar game to this with planes and this one is honestly better. great job, devs! keep up the great work!

I really enjoy this game. if don't have the foggiest idea why I just do. It's really enjoyable to see if I can beat my previous score.And then to get all the goodies and upgrade. the ads do get tedious. and then I just turn it off and restart later. Try it you might like it.

New Favourite ,Way better & fun than I expected!!! Sad that Except the the Cute penguin ,the rest of the characters are just usual human ones. Can you add more cute animal characters like Kitten /puppies /cubs etc to the roaster ,and perhaps gear system (I wanna see that penguin with a little snow cap & scarf) ,pretty please?

Great job at the physics the friction and all the images although can you fix one rendering bug because ing you have one map but One part of the track is see-through maybe next time a much more better algorithm make the ice not turn see-through on one map but great job I love your app Great game by the way
